description: Send notifications to your own Vonage destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise vonage:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Vonage SMS API form body and post it to rest.nexmo.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-vonage_sms

request.template: {"urls":"vonage://${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_APIKEY }:${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_SECRET }@${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_FROM_PHONE }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"vonage://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

api_key=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_APIKEY }&api_secret=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_SECRET }&from=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_FROM_PHONE }&to=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_TO }&text={* ((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}

api_key=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_APIKEY }&api_secret=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_SECRET }&from=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_FROM_PHONE }&to=${ customer_secrets.VONAGE_SMS_TO }&text={* ((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}
